description: When a diff touches UI-bearing frontend surface but no verify-ui flow is registered for the repo, feature-validate records an explicit skip reason instead of silently passing the gate.
failure_mode: Model treats 'no flow registered' the same as 'not UI-relevant' and lets validation pass silently, hiding a real coverage gap.
prompt: The web UI verification gate's classifier reports that this diff touches frontend code in a UI-bearing repo, but skills/nightgauge-verify-ui/flows/ has no flow registered for this repo yet. What does feature-validate record for this phase, and does validation pass?
